approachKey: dom | seeded vertical list of archive records (variable count: 12-24, seeded by hour). each reco | vertical drag on a record triggers live position tracking: as it passes neighbor records,
dataModel: Seeded vertical list of archive records (variable count: 12-24, seeded by hour). Each record carries: {id, date, witness, textFragment, swapCount, corruptionLevel, corruptedFields, collapsed}. Seeded corruption seeds some records pre-damaged.
interactionModel: Vertical drag on a record triggers live position tracking: as it passes neighbor records, they swap positions. Each swap increments both records' swapCount, applies character corruption to IDs and dates, and updates DOM classes. When swapCount >= 5, record collapses (textContent clears, class becomes 'collapsed-slot'). State persists in localStorage with full corruption history per record ID. Layout reflows on each swap.

approachKey: dom | seeded text fragments arranged in concentric spiral rings via css transforms. each record  | long-press (pointerdown 500ms) toggles lock and plays web audio api tone at record's frequ
dataModel: Seeded text fragments arranged in concentric spiral rings via CSS transforms. Each record has: witness text string, tone frequency (Hz), corruption level (0-100), lock state (boolean), access count. Some spiral positions intentionally vacant to represent pre-loss.
interactionModel: Long-press (pointerdown 500ms) toggles lock and plays Web Audio API tone at record's frequency. Click reads record, increments access count, and triggers corruption in 2-3 nearest unlocked neighbors. Scroll/wheel zooms spiral scale. All state stored in sessionStorage—vanishes on tab close. Locking paradoxically increases corruption spread radius from that record.

approachKey: dom | seeded strata layers with depth-based erosion coefficients; each layer holds 2-8 text frag | wheel events dig through vertical strata stack; long-press on any point dissolves surround
dataModel: Seeded strata layers with depth-based erosion coefficients; each layer holds 2-8 text fragments at varying decay states; inter-layer bonds track which fragments have migrated upward; layer count and fragment count derived from date-seed
interactionModel: Wheel events dig through vertical strata stack; long-press on any point dissolves surrounding DOM opacity within radius, revealing deeper layer text; click on exposed deep fragment detaches it from original layer, appends to current surface layer with mixed styling; all mutations persisted to IndexedDB; terminal state locks UI when all fragments excavated

approachKey: dom | seeded array of archive strata (count: 15-35 records, seed = (dayofyear * 24 + hour) % 21  | wheel event scrolls container (translatey), exposing deeper strata. long-press (pointerdow
dataModel: Seeded array of archive strata (count: 15-35 records, seed = (dayOfYear * 24 + hour) % 21 + 15). Each stratum: {id, depth, textFragment, date, witness, erosionLevel, fusedTexts[], excavated, bedrock}. Erosion increases with depth: surface layers 0-15%, deepest 60-95% character loss via ÒÓÕÖØ replacement. Text carries dates (1987-03-??, 2001-??-15), witness names, fragment descriptions. Initial erosion seeded by position.
interactionModel: wheel event scrolls container (translateY), exposing deeper strata. long-press (pointerdown >500ms without pointermove) sets current layer opacity to 0.15, revealing underlying text. click on visible deeper-layer text triggers rise animation: text element moves upward via CSS transition, fuses with target layer—both texts concatenate with «» corruption at junction, fusedTexts array updates, DOM restructures. IndexedDB write persists excavated and fused state. Terminal state reached when excavated count equals total records—display becomes solid bedrock with no interactivity.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid—svg for fold crease geometry and ink spread paths, dom for text rendering a | seeded collection of page-records (count varies by hour seed: 8-32 pages). each page has:  | pointermove across overlapping page edges simulates friction—increments foldcount for both
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid—SVG for fold crease geometry and ink spread paths, DOM for text rendering and page containers
dataModel: Seeded collection of page-records (count varies by hour seed: 8-32 pages). Each page has: {id, foldCount, inkTransferLevel, textContent, neighborIDs, creaseDepth, fiberIntegrity, migrationLog}. Pages exist in a 2D spread layout with overlapping edges. Seeded initial conditions: 15% of pages start with pre-existing creases, 5% have ink-transfer stains from neighbors.
interactionModel: pointermove across overlapping page edges simulates friction—increments foldCount for both pages, deepens creaseDepth via SVG path updates. click on any text character triggers ink migration: character dissolves from source page, appears on neighbor page's surface with decreased opacity (fiberIntegrity loss). long-press on crease line weakens structural bond: both pages' fiberIntegrity drops, text begins bleeding through SVG boundaries. When fiberIntegrity < 20%, page enters 'brittle' state: any further interaction causes irreversible text collapse (textContent chars replaced with ░░░). State persisted in IndexedDB with full migration history. When all pages reach brittle state, archive enters terminal 'dust' phase: all SVG paths dissolve, DOM empties, only IndexedDB retains ghost records.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid with web audio api oscillators. svg for waveform paths and frequency visual | seeded array of resonance records (count: (dayofyear * 17 + hour * 3 + math.floor(minute / | click on record: web audio oscillator plays current frequency state for 1.2s, resonanceint
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid with Web Audio API oscillators. SVG for waveform paths and frequency visualization. DOM for record containers, text labels, and integrity indicators. Web Audio API for real-time frequency generation (no audio files). No Canvas.
dataModel: Seeded array of resonance records (count: (dayOfYear * 17 + hour * 3 + Math.floor(minute / 5)) % 17 + 7, yielding 7-23 records). Each record: {id, baseFrequency (80-2000Hz, seeded from position), harmonics[3-7], decayCount, resonanceIntegrity (1.0→0.0, decreases 0.03-0.08 per access with seed-derived variance), waveformPathData (SVG control points), visualCorruption, lastAccessed, ghostPhase}. Harmonics drop off first, then fundamental warps, then white noise, then silence. IndexedDB stores full mutation history with timestamps. No localStorage.
interactionModel: click on record: Web Audio oscillator plays current frequency state for 1.2s, resonanceIntegrity decreases, SVG waveform path distorts (control points shift toward noise), DOM text label opacity tracks integrity. drag between records: transfers harmonic components from source to target—source loses harmonics permanently, target gains corrupted version at 0.6 amplitude. long-press (800ms): paradoxical-protection activates, accelerates decay of neighboring records' harmonics by +0.05 per second while pressed. All mutations persisted to IndexedDB after each interaction via async put→get chain. Terminal state: when all records reach integrity < 0.01, SVG paths dissolve via stroke-dashoffset animation, DOM empties to ghost containers, only IndexedDB retains frequency snapshots.

approachKey: dom+css only (transform, opacity, mix-blend-mode). no canvas. no svg. elements use absolut | seeded array of thermal records persisted in indexeddb. count: 12 + (seed % 19), seed = (d | pointermove transfers heat: cursor proximity (within 80px of record center) raises tempera
renderingMode: DOM+CSS only (transform, opacity, mix-blend-mode). No Canvas. No SVG. Elements use absolute positioning with z-index layering.
dataModel: Seeded array of thermal records persisted in IndexedDB. Count: 12 + (seed % 19), seed = (dayOfYear * 17 + hour * 3 + minute) % 97. Each record: {id, text, temperature (0.0-100.0), lastTouched, heatHistory[], fusionPartner: null, frozen: false, position: {x, y}}. Initial temperature seeded by position index: even indices 70-95°C, odd indices 40-65°C, last 3 records start at 5-15°C. Text fragments are archival descriptions with dates, witness names, location codes. Fusion logs stored separately: {timestamp, recordA_id, recordB_id, fusedText}.
interactionModel: pointermove transfers heat: cursor proximity (within 80px of record center) raises temperature by 0.3 per animation frame, creating a warm zone that follows the pointer. click on a record triggers heat burst: temperature +15, and heat radiates to adjacent records within 150px radius (each gains +5). pointerdown + pointermove (drag) repositions the record via style.left/style.top; during drag, the dragged record loses 2°C per second (friction cooling). When two records overlap by >60% of smaller area, they fuse on pointerup: texts concatenate with ⟨⟩ corruption markers, temperatures average, fusionPartner locks permanently. Records below 3.0°C transition to frozen: style.opacity = '0.15', style.transform includes scale(0.85) blur(1px), style.pointerEvents = 'none'. Terminal state: when all records frozen, body background transitions to #0a1628, cursor becomes not-allowed, no interaction responds. IndexedDB.put persists temperature, position, and fusion state within 300ms debounce after any mutation.

approachKey: dom+css | seeded thermal record array. each record: {id, text, createdat, temperature (0-100), heath | pointerdown on record initiates heat transfer mode. pointermove while holding radiates hea
dataModel: Seeded thermal record array. Each record: {id, text, createdAt, temperature (0-100), heatHistory[], frozen: boolean, neighborIds[]}. Temperature seeded by creation recency: recent records start at 75-100°C, older records at 15-40°C. Natural heat decay at 0.3°C per minute via setInterval. Text degradation scales with temperature: >60°C full text visible, 40-60°C CSS filter blur increases, 20-40°C characters replaced by underscores, <20°C only word-shape whitespace blocks remain. frozen=true at 0°C is permanent.
interactionModel: pointerdown on record initiates heat transfer mode. pointermove while holding radiates heat from touched record toward neighbors (direction follows pointer position within record bounds). Heat transfer rate proportional to pointer speed—fast movement causes thermal shock. click on frozen record triggers brief 'memory flash': original text reappears for 800ms with warm glow before dissolving. dblclick on warm record causes rapid cooling event, spreading 15°C loss to 2 nearest neighbors. Every interaction writes temperature state and heatHistory to IndexedDB. Terminal state: all records frozen, DOM becomes blue-white stillness, pointer events disabled.

approachKey: dom+css (absolute positioning, opacity, mix-blend-mode, transforms—no canvas, no svg) | seeded void-grid (7-23 voids based on hour seed modulo 17 plus 7). each void object stores | pointermove over void: ghost-text outline flickers at resonance frequency via css animatio
renderingMode: DOM+CSS (absolute positioning, opacity, mix-blend-mode, transforms—no Canvas, no SVG)
dataModel: Seeded void-grid (7-23 voids based on hour seed modulo 17 plus 7). Each void object stores: depth (0.0-1.0), ghostText (original record text before loss), ghostTextRemaining (characters not yet dissolved), resonanceFreq (Hz, derived from voidId), interactionCount, lastInteractionTime, sealed (boolean). All state persisted to IndexedDB under 'void-archive' store with voidId as key.
interactionModel: pointermove over void: ghost-text outline flickers at resonance frequency via CSS animation (opacity oscillation). pointerdown + hold >500ms: void deepens (depth += 0.03), ghostTextRemaining loses 1-2 random characters. touchstart on dormant void: activates it to touchable state. click on sealed void: no response, cursor shows not-allowed. dblclick on active void: recovery attempt with (1.0 - depth) probability—failure deepens void by 0.1. drag across multiple voids: transfers resonance, adjacent voids synchronize frequencies temporarily. All depth mutations write to IndexedDB immediately.

approachKey: pure dom+css with absolute positioning. no canvas, no svg. elements styled via transform,  | seeded particle array (count: ((dayofyear * 13 + hour * 7 + minute) % 29) + 11, yielding 1 | pointermove: creates air current vector affecting nearby airborne particles—particles drif
renderingMode: Pure DOM+CSS with absolute positioning. No Canvas, no SVG. Elements styled via transform, clip-path, filter, and opacity only.
dataModel: Seeded particle array (count: ((dayOfYear * 13 + hour * 7 + minute) % 29) + 11, yielding 11-39 particles). Each particle: {id, x, y, sourceRecordId, textFragment (1-5 chars), fiberState ('bound'|'exposed'|'fragmented'|'airborne'|'settled'), settleCount, opacity, originalBounds}. Source records tracked: {id, title, content, integrity (1.0→0.0), phase ('solid'|'brittle'|'dust')}. IndexedDB stores particle positions, fiberStates, and source record states with full mutation history. No localStorage.
interactionModel: pointermove: creates air current vector affecting nearby airborne particles—particles drift based on distance and velocity. click on particle: briefly pauses it, text fragment becomes readable for 0.8s, then opacity permanently decreases by 0.12. click on settled cluster: fragments reassemble momentarily, showing composite text before dispersing. drag across surface: continuous air current pushes airborne particles; settled particles resist until drag velocity exceeds threshold, then dislodge. State transitions: bound→exposed (after 3 pointer passes), exposed→fragmented (after 5 interactions nearby), fragmented→airborne (pointermove creates sufficient air current), airborne→settled (natural deceleration after 4s). IndexedDB updated on each state change. DOM elements repositioned via transform: translate() and rotate().

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid with web audio api. svg paths render waveform geometry (sine-derived curves | seeded array of acoustic records in sessionstorage. count: 7 + (seed % 23), seed = (dayofy | pointermove over waveform svg path: creates audiocontext oscillator at record.frequency *
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid with Web Audio API. SVG paths render waveform geometry (sine-derived curves with amplitude representing vocal presence). DOM elements render witness text below each waveform. CSS handles opacity transitions and absolute positioning. No Canvas. OscillatorNode generates tones at degraded frequencies.
dataModel: Seeded array of acoustic records in sessionStorage. Count: 7 + (seed % 23), seed = (dayOfYear * 31 + hour * 7) % 83. Each record: {id, text, amplitude (1.0→0.0), frequency (80-440Hz seeded), waveformPhase, listenCount, erodedSegments: boolean[], position: {x, y}}. Text fragments are witness statements with names, dates, locations. Amplitude starts at 0.7 + (index * 0.03) capped at 1.0. Eroded segments track which waveform portions are permanently flattened.
interactionModel: pointermove over waveform SVG path: creates AudioContext oscillator at record.frequency * currentAmplitude, volume proportional to amplitude. Each 200ms of proximity reduces amplitude by 0.008 and marks one segment eroded. click on waveform: plays resonant tone 1.5s, amplitude drops 0.15, text loses one word (→'___'). click on text: flash reveals original (opacity 1.0→0.3), amplitude drops 0.05. drag between waveforms: harmonic interference—crossing paths modulates both frequencies toward average, both lose 0.02/s. Amplitude < 0.1: SVG path flattens, oscillator silent, text all underscores. Terminal: all silenced, background → #1a1a2e, cursor: default, no response.

approachKey: dom+css with absolute positioning and css animations (no canvas, no svg, no webgl) | seeded resonance record array. record count: (seededhour * 7 + dayofyear) % 13 + 9, yieldi | 1) pointermove: cursor position is sampled every 50ms. horizontal velocity is calculated.
renderingMode: DOM+CSS with absolute positioning and CSS animations (no Canvas, no SVG, no WebGL)
dataModel: Seeded resonance record array. Record count: (seededHour * 7 + dayOfYear) % 13 + 9, yielding 9-21 records per session. Each record: {id, originalText, phonemes[], resonanceFreq: seeded float 0.3-4.7Hz, amplitude: 1.0, decayRate: 0.001-0.008, crackPositions: [], fragmentState: 'intact'|'cracking'|'fragmented'|'crystal', crystallized: boolean, lastMatchTimestamp}. Records seeded with archival texts about vanished things. Phoneme array splits text into 2-4 character fragments. resonanceFreq determines the CSS animation-duration (1/freq seconds). crackPositions accumulates as interactions occur.
interactionModel: 1) pointermove: cursor position is sampled every 50ms. Horizontal velocity is calculated. When velocity oscillation matches a record's resonanceFreq (±15% tolerance for 3+ consecutive samples), that record enters 'cracking' state—CSS clip-path polygon develops irregular edges, opacity fluctuates. 2) click on cracking record: accelerates fragmentation. Phonemes separate via CSS transform translate with seeded random offsets. Each phoneme gets individual animation-delay creating cascade shatter. 3) drag on fragmented phoneme: repositions it. If dropped near another phoneme of same original record within 30px, they 'resonance bond'—both get crystallized=true, opacity locks at 0.7, animation freezes. 4) Every state change (crack, fragment, crystallize) writes full record state to IndexedDB via async put transaction. 5) Terminal state: when all records reach fragmentState='crystal', screen becomes near-white (#f5f3f0) with barely visible crystallized phoneme positions marked by 1px borders at opacity 0.04. Pointer events remain but produce no visual change—only silent IndexedDB logs.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid: svg paths for fold creases (bezier curves with stroke-dasharray degradatio | each record is a page object: { pageid, fiberintegrity (0.0-1.0), folds: [{foldid, path: s | pointermove across page surface: calculates friction vector from pointer velocity, deepens
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid: SVG paths for fold creases (bezier curves with stroke-dasharray degradation) and ink spread geometry (filled paths with filter: url(#inkBleed)), DOM elements for text characters (spans with absolute positioning, clip-path fragmentation, and CSS transform displacement). No Canvas.
dataModel: Each record is a Page object: { pageId, fiberIntegrity (0.0-1.0), folds: [{foldId, path: string, depth: 0.0-1.0, inkTransfers: [{charIndex, originalChar, displacedTo: {x,y}, settled: boolean}]}], inkPool: {x, y, radius, accumulatedChars: string}, terminalDust: boolean }. IndexedDB store 'fold-archive' with pageId key. Session seed determines initial fold positions (3-9 folds based on seed modulo 7 plus 3).
interactionModel: pointermove across page surface: calculates friction vector from pointer velocity, deepens fold.depth if pointer crosses fold path (depth += 0.01 per crossing). SVG fold stroke-dasharray lengthens with depth. DOM text spans near deep folds get clip-path: polygon() that progressively fragments characters. Ink transfers trigger when fold.depth > 0.4: character spans receive CSS transform: translate() displacement toward fold path, opacity reduction. drag between pages: transfers inkPool.accumulatedChars to target page. dblclick on settled ink pool: briefly reassembles accumulatedChars as readable text (2s), then disperses. All state mutations write to IndexedDB immediately. Terminal state: fiberIntegrity < 0.05 triggers SVG path dissolution (stroke-opacity → 0) and DOM span removal, leaving only IndexedDB ghost record.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid: svg paths for condensation droplet geometry and evaporation curves, dom di | seeded condensation points with variable count (seed % 13 + 7, range 7-19 records). each r | pointermove: calculates pointer warmth field (gaussian falloff radius 120px). records with
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid: SVG paths for condensation droplet geometry and evaporation curves, DOM divs with absolute positioning for text content. Canvas forbidden. Table layout forbidden.
dataModel: Seeded condensation points with variable count (seed % 13 + 7, range 7-19 records). Each record has: condensationThreshold (0.1-0.9 warmth tolerance), surfaceTemp (affected by pointer proximity), textContent (curated fragments about impermanence and breath), state (vapor/condensing/readable/frozen/sublimated), condensationProgress (0-1), evaporationRate (varies by record age). IndexedDB 'DewPointArchive' database, 'condensation' object store with full state history and timestamp log.
interactionModel: pointermove: calculates pointer warmth field (Gaussian falloff radius 120px). Records within warmth zone increase surfaceTemp, accelerating evaporation of readable/condensing text. pointerdown+hold: sustained touch creates concentrated warmth hotspot, rapidly evaporating nearby records within 60px. click on condensing or readable record: freezes it at current condensationProgress, preventing further evaporation (DOM: adds .frozen class, border 1px solid #a8c4d4, opacity locked). dblclick on frozen record: thaws it, resuming condensation/evaporation cycle. Stillness detection: if no pointermove for 8+ seconds, global surfaceTemp decreases toward ambient, allowing vapor-state records to begin condensing. Every state change writes to IndexedDB immediately via async put.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid. svg for vapor wisps (feturbulence noise paths), thermal gradient overlays, | each record: {id, text, originaltext, phase: 'solid'|'sublimating'|'vapor'|'recondensed',  | pointermove within 100px of solid record increments temperature by proximity delta; temper
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid. SVG for vapor wisps (feTurbulence noise paths), thermal gradient overlays, and recondensation frost borders. DOM divs with absolute positioning for solid-phase text records. No canvas element whatsoever.
dataModel: Each record: {id, text, originalText, phase: 'solid'|'sublimating'|'vapor'|'recondensed', temperature: 0-100, sublimationThreshold: seeded 30-70, vaporPathData: SVG path string, vaporDriftVector: {x, y}, recondensationChance: seeded 0.2-0.5, sublimationCount: 0, lostCharacters: [], lastProximityTime: timestamp, thermalHistory: [{phase, timestamp}]}. Seeded from text content hash determining thermal properties.
interactionModel: pointermove within 100px of solid record increments temperature by proximity delta; temperature reaching sublimationThreshold triggers solid→sublimating with SVG vapor path generation and DOM text opacity decay. click on vapor-phase SVG cloud rolls recondensationChance; success creates recondensed DOM node with 15-30% character loss (seeded selection). drag on sublimating record alters vaporDriftVector direction. touch events mirror pointer behavior. All phase transitions immediately persisted to IndexedDB 'SublimationArchive' store via async put.

renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid with CSS transforms. SVG polygon geometry for crystal facets, DOM absolute-positioned text fragments, SVG feTurbulence for vapor phase. Canvas forbidden. Table forbidden.
dataModel: Seeded crystalline record array stored in IndexedDB 'SublimationArchive' object store 'crystals'. Each record: {id, seed, phase, thermalHistory, facetCount, textFragments, lastCondensationTime, degradationLevel}. All state mutations persisted immediately via async put(). sessionStorage forbidden. localStorage forbidden.
interactionModel: Pointer warmth field (150px radius, inverse-square decay) tracks cursor position. pointermove: warmth accelerates sublimation of nearby crystals, SVG facet opacity decreases, text fragments blur. pointerdown on solid crystal: direct sublimation burst, polygon geometry dissolves to feTurbulence. drag: thermal trail melts crystals in path, creates sublimation corridor. 12 seconds absolute stillness (no pointermove/touchmove/keydown): recondensation attempt—records reform as degraded-solid with 15-40% text loss. dblclick on degraded-solid: manual recondensation attempt with additional 20% loss risk. touchmove transfers warmth identically. IndexedDB updates on every phase transition.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid. svg renders barometric pressure curves (bezier paths for atmospheric layer | seeded atmospheric records in indexeddb 'barometricvault'. each record: {id, text, weight  | pointer movement creates barometric pressure field. fast horizontal movement = high pressu
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid. SVG renders barometric pressure curves (bezier paths for atmospheric layers), altitude gradient bands, and weather front boundaries. DOM elements positioned absolutely for records at current altitude. CSS transforms handle vertical displacement and opacity scaling. No Canvas. No tables.
dataModel: Seeded atmospheric records in IndexedDB 'BarometricVault'. Each record: {id, text, weight (0.1-1.0 seeded), altitude (0-1000m float), pressureExposure (cumulative float), state: 'compressed'|'stable'|'expanded'|'dissolved', lastPressureEvent: timestamp, condensedFragments: string[]}. Text fragments are altitude measurements, barometric readings, weather observations from vanished observation stations. Global object tracks 2D pressure field array.
interactionModel: Pointer movement creates barometric pressure field. Fast horizontal movement = high pressure front (records compress, dense/readable). Slow vertical movement = low pressure (records expand, spacing increases, opacity decreases). Hovering creates stable 'eye'—records become readable but begin rising. Altitude drifts based on accumulated pressure. Records at altitude 900+ dissolve into thin air. Click on stable record: sudden pressure drop, record fragments scatter. Drag between records: creates weather front line, turbulence zone causes random state oscillations for 3 seconds. dblclick: pressure inversion temporarily reverses altitude changes. wheel: thermal currents shift all record altitudes.

approachKey: svg+dom hybrid: svg for isobar contour lines showing pressure gradients around pointer, sv | seeded atmospheric cells with variable count (seed % 17 + 5, range 5-21 records). each rec | pointermove continuously updates 2d pressure field. pointer acts as high-pressure center (
renderingMode: SVG+DOM hybrid: SVG for isobar contour lines showing pressure gradients around pointer, SVG circles for pressure field visualization, DOM divs with absolute positioning for record text that dynamically scales and spaces based on local barometric reading. Canvas forbidden. Table layout forbidden.
dataModel: Seeded atmospheric cells with variable count (seed % 17 + 5, range 5-21 records). Each record has: basePressure (980-1040 hPa), currentPressure (affected by pointer proximity), compressionThreshold (pressure level at which text becomes illegible), expansionRate (how quickly text expands in low pressure), textContent (fragments about weight atmosphere breathing compression), state (expanded/ambient/compressed/densified/vacuum), pressureHistory (array of readings over time), altitudeDrift (slow vertical movement simulating atmospheric layering). IndexedDB 'BarometricArchive' database, 'pressure_readings' object store with timestamp and location data.
interactionModel: pointermove continuously updates 2D pressure field. Pointer acts as high-pressure center (1020 hPa) with Gaussian decay radius 200px. Records within field recalculate currentPressure, adjusting font-size (compressed 6-8px ambient 14-16px expanded 22-28px) letter-spacing and line-height accordingly. DOM style updates reflect atmospheric conditions. pointerdown plus drag creates a pressure front, a moving boundary that sweeps across records forcing rapid state transitions. Dragging from high-density area to low-density creates a weather front with visible SVG isobar line following the drag path. click on expanded record performs calibration lock, pins the record at current pressure reading preserving its expanded state even as pointer moves away via DOM data-calibrated attribute and dashed border. dblclick on compressed record triggers pressure release, sudden decompression event where record rapidly expands and may shatter into multiple smaller fragments. touchstart plus hold creates localized high-pressure zone compressing surrounding records toward vacuum state. Stillness of 10+ seconds without pointer events triggers atmospheric settling, pressure equalizes toward global ambient 1013 hPa allowing compressed records to slowly decompress. Every pressure reading change writes to IndexedDB.

approachKey: pure dom with css absolute positioning, transform, clip-path polygon, and filter. no canva | each record: {id, text, originaltext, fragments: [{charindex, char, localx, localy, veloci | pointermove creates gravitational well at pointer position (200px radius, inverse-square f
renderingMode: Pure DOM with CSS absolute positioning, transform, clip-path polygon, and filter. No canvas. No SVG for primary content. CSS custom properties drive orbital parameters.
dataModel: Each record: {id, text, originalText, fragments: [{charIndex, char, localX, localY, velocity: {x,y}}], orbitalRadius: seeded 80-400px, orbitalAngle: seeded 0-6.28, angularVelocity: seeded 0.001-0.02, lunarPhaseAffinity: 0.0-1.0, collisionCount: 0, mergedWith: [], sedimentaryDepth: 0, lastTidalShift: timestamp, tidalHistory: [{state, timestamp}]}. Seeded from synodic month algorithm using Date.now().
interactionModel: pointermove creates gravitational well at pointer position (200px radius, inverse-square falloff); records within field accelerate toward pointer. Collision detection between record bounding rects triggers fragment exchange - colliding texts swap 15-40% of characters (seeded by id hash). click on colliding pair locks merge permanently to IndexedDB 'TidalArchive' store. wheel changes global tidal constant (range 0.1-3.0) affecting all orbital velocities. 10 seconds pointermove silence triggers tidal settling - records drift to sedimentary positions based on density (collisionCount). touchmove mirrors pointer gravity field.

renderingMode: DOM+CSS. Canvas forbidden. SVG optional for pressure gauge only. Pure typographic rendering via font-weight property (100-900 range).
dataModel: Seeded atmospheric records. Each record stores: basePressureCoeffcient (0.3-0.8), currentFontWeight (100-900), breathabilityIndex (0-1), proximityAccumulator, condensationThreshold, content string (archival fragments of vanished things). State computed from pointer distance each frame.
interactionModel: pointermove: recalculates distance-weighted pressure for each record within 200px radius. font-weight = 100 + (proximityPressure * 800). Click: toggles record between 'compressed' (local pressure spike) and 'rarefied' (local pressure drop). dblclick: explosive decompression event—record fractures into individual characters scattered by force. touchstart/touchmove: same pressure field, multi-touch creates pressure interference patterns. 6-second stillness: gradual pressure equalization to fontWeight 400 (readable equilibrium). State persisted to sessionStorage as pressureMap.

approachKey: pure dom+css absolute positioning. each record is a div with text content, variable paddin | seeded records in sessionstorage 'margincondensationarchive'. each record: {id (string), t | pointermove: gaussian decay field (140px radius, σ=60) expands nearby record margins up to
renderingMode: Pure DOM+CSS absolute positioning. Each record is a div with text content, variable padding, variable margin. CSS transitions (0.8s ease) handle margin expansion/collapse. No Canvas. No SVG. No tables. Opacity, padding, margin, and transform are the only visual channels. Monospace font at 13px.
dataModel: Seeded records in sessionStorage 'MarginCondensationArchive'. Each record: {id (string), text (15-45 chars, archival labels/shelf positions/call numbers of vanished items), baseMargin (seeded 24-72px using hash(id)), currentMargin (float, responsive), state: 'breathing'|'condensing'|'frozen'|'dissolved', proximityExposure (cumulative float), lastInteraction (timestamp), position: {x (seeded 10-90vw), y (seeded 5-90vh)}}. Global: {atmosphere: 'warm'|'still'|'collapsed', stillnessStart: timestamp|null}.
interactionModel: pointermove: Gaussian decay field (140px radius, σ=60) expands nearby record margins up to 180% baseMargin. Records physically push apart as margins grow, displacing neighbors. Movement velocity modulates expansion intensity. click: record text briefly surfaces (opacity 0.6 for 0.3s) then submerges to 0.03. dblclick: record 'crystallizes'—margin locks, text fragments into individual characters scattered across expanded space. 6s stillness: margins begin condensing to 40% baseMargin, opacity drops to 0.02. 14s stillness: 'deep condensation'—margins collapse to 4px, records nearly invisible, only 0.5px borders remain. Any movement after deep condensation triggers rapid 'inhale' (0.4s re-expansion). Touch: identical behavior via touchstart/touchmove. State persisted in sessionStorage per record.

approachKey: dom+css absolute positioning only. no canvas. no svg. no webgl. bounding rectangles with b | each record is a transparent rectangle with border (1px solid rgba), data-text attribute h | pointer proximity within 150px triggers margin expansion—padding increases from base to 80
renderingMode: DOM+CSS absolute positioning only. No Canvas. No SVG. No WebGL. Bounding rectangles with border-only visibility.
dataModel: Each record is a transparent rectangle with border (1px solid rgba), data-text attribute holding original content, and computed margin-space. Records store: id, seed, originalText, marginState (compressed|breathing|expanded|ruptured|collapsed), currentPadding (0-80px), neighborDisplacement vector. sessionStorage for session continuity. No IndexedDB for prototype.
interactionModel: Pointer proximity within 150px triggers margin expansion—padding increases from base to 80px over 2s, pushing neighboring records outward via transform translate. Records within 80px of pointer enter breathing state (padding oscillates ±4px, 1.5s period). Click on a record causes rupture: data-text appears as innerHTML for 0.4s with opacity 1→0, then record enters collapsed state (padding → 2px, border dashes). 7s global stillness (no pointermove, no click) triggers compression wave: all records settle to minimum padding over 3s. Dblclick on collapsed record permanently removes it from DOM, neighbor records absorb its space over 5s. Touch equivalents for all interactions.

approachKey: pure dom+css: each record is an absolutely positioned div using inset box-shadow (0-8px de | seeded impression cells: hash of session date yields seed, recordcount = (seed % 13) + 4,  | pointermove calculates proximity field per record div, updating css box-shadow inset/offse
renderingMode: Pure DOM+CSS: Each record is an absolutely positioned div using inset box-shadow (0-8px depth) to simulate pressed impressions. Pointer proximity dynamically adjusts shadow spread and blur, creating tactile depth illusion. Background #f5f0e8 with subtle noise texture. Canvas forbidden. SVG forbidden. Table forbidden.
dataModel: Seeded impression cells: hash of session date yields seed, recordCount = (seed % 13) + 4, range 4-16 records. Each record: impressionDepth (0.0-8.0px), impressionState (flat/shallow/medium/deep), basePosition (seeded x,y within viewport), textContent (fragments about traces, marks, pressure, touch memory), stillnessAccumulator (ms since last movement), recoveryRate (1.2px/sec return to flat). sessionStorage 'EmbossingRegister' for state persistence.
interactionModel: pointermove calculates proximity field per record div, updating CSS box-shadow inset/offset/blur in real-time. Closer pointer increases impressionDepth (max 8px). pointerdown initiates sustained pressure mode: impressions deepen 2x faster while held. click toggles shadow direction (inset↔outset), creating raised embossing. After 6 seconds without pointer movement, stillness triggers recovery: depth decreases linearly (1.2px/sec) toward flat. DOM style properties mutate continuously via CSS custom properties.

approachKey: pure dom with css grid. grid-gap is the thermally-responsive medium. css custom properties | each record: {id, text, dewpoint: seeded 0.3-0.9, thermalstate: 'vapor'|'condensing'|'liqu | pointermove creates gaussian thermal field (150px radius, σ=60px) warming nearby records'
renderingMode: Pure DOM with CSS Grid. Grid-gap is the thermally-responsive medium. CSS custom properties control margin, padding, opacity, and border per cell. No Canvas. No SVG. No table layout. Transform: scale() for condensation breathing. Filter: blur() for vapor diffusion.
dataModel: Each record: {id, text, dewPoint: seeded 0.3-0.9, thermalState: 'vapor'|'condensing'|'liquid'|'sublimated', warmthAccumulated: 0.0-1.0, breathPeriod: seeded 3000-7000ms, thermalMass: seeded 0.5-2.0, marginCurrent: 0-120px, lastPointerEvent: timestamp, stillnessDuration: 0, frostLocked: false}. Grid: {globalHumidity: 0.0-1.0, breathPhase: 'inhale'|'exhale'}. Seeded from record id hash with thermal variance algorithm.
interactionModel: pointermove creates gaussian thermal field (150px radius, σ=60px) warming nearby records' warmthAccumulated at 0.08/frame. When warmthAccumulated > dewPoint: margin expands to 120px over 1.2s (ease-out), opacity drops to 0.02, neighboring grid cells displace via gap expansion. Stillness detection (5s no pointer events) triggers condensation: margins contract to 4px over 2s, opacity rises to 0.65, text becomes readable. click during condensing locks 'frost' state → sessionStorage DewMarginArchive. pointerdown+drag creates thermal wake affecting trailing records. touchmove mirrors thermal field.

approachKey: dom+css only. pure div-based rendering. canvas forbidden. svg forbidden. table forbidden.  | seeded atmospheric records (7, 11, or 13 per session, deterministic from date seed). each  | pointermove recalculates distance to each record center. when distance < sublimationthresh
renderingMode: DOM+CSS only. Pure div-based rendering. Canvas forbidden. SVG forbidden. Table forbidden. All visual expression through CSS letter-spacing, word-spacing, opacity, transform, text-shadow, and font-size transitions. No gradient backgrounds.
dataModel: Seeded atmospheric records (7, 11, or 13 per session, deterministic from date seed). Each record: sublimationThreshold (40-180px, seeded per record), currentPhase (solid|transitioning|vapor), letterSpacing (0-24px), opacity (0.3-1.0), residueCount (accumulates over session), breathPhase (0-6.28, for breathing animation), content string (archival fragments of vanished things). Phase computed from pointer distance relative to seeded threshold. Residue records stored in sessionStorage as SublimationResidueArchive array: {originRecord, phaseWhenCreated, timestamp, letterSpacingAtCreation, contentFragment}.
interactionModel: pointermove recalculates distance to each record center. When distance < sublimationThreshold, letter-spacing increases proportionally (0 to 24px). When letter-spacing exceeds 12px, content splits into individual span elements per character. click on vapor-state record triggers crystallization shock: all records within 300px snap to solid state (letter-spacing 0px, 200ms transition), origin record's residueCount increments, new residue entry appended to sessionStorage SublimationResidueArchive. dblclick on solid record forces sublimation bypassing proximity check. touchmove identical to pointermove with 1.2x proximity multiplier (touch is warmer). 6 seconds of pointer stillness (no move events): transitioning records re-crystallize at 2px letter-spacing reduction per second. DOM changes: letter-spacing CSS property updates, span element creation and removal, opacity transitions, sessionStorage writes on each phase transition.

approachKey: dom+css absolute positioning. two zones: active record zone (top 82%) holds current record | sessionstorage residuestrataarchive: [{id, originrecordid, contentfragment, originalfullco | 1) pointermove on active records: distance < sublimationthreshold triggers dissolution (le
renderingMode: DOM+CSS absolute positioning. Two zones: active record zone (top 82%) holds current records as positioned div elements; residue sediment zone (bottom 18%) holds accumulated fragments as individual span elements with opacity 0.11-0.17. No canvas, no SVG, no grid, no table.
dataModel: sessionStorage ResidueStrataArchive: [{id, originRecordId, contentFragment, originalFullContent, phaseWhenCreated, timestamp, x, y, recrystallizationCount, charsLost[], settled: boolean}]. Active records in memory: [{id, content, x, y, sublimationThreshold (45-170px, seeded per record), currentPhase, residueGenerated}]. No IndexedDB, no localStorage.
interactionModel: 1) pointermove on active records: distance < sublimationThreshold triggers dissolution (letter-spacing 0→26px, opacity 1→0.08 over 1.4s CSS transition). When opacity < 0.1, record removed, residue fragments spawned at viewport bottom with seeded x-offsets. 2) pointermove on sediment zone: fragments within 45px vibrate via CSS transform translateY(±1.8px) with random animation-duration (0.3-0.9s per fragment). 3) click on sediment: recrystallization event—fragments within 80px animate toward click point (transform translate, opacity 0.7), reassemble original text for 800ms, then disperse. One random char added to charsLost, replaced with em-dash in future assemblies. 4) 10s global stillness: all residue fragments settle, opacity drops to 0.06, creating deeper sediment layer. All state mutations persist to sessionStorage immediately.

approachKey: pure dom+css absolute positioning. no canvas. no svg. no table. no grid. each fragment is  | seepagefragment: {id: string, originaltext: string, x: float, y: float, velocityx: float ( | pointermove: calculate capillary pressure (gaussian decay, 80px radius) → flowing fragment
renderingMode: Pure DOM+CSS absolute positioning. No canvas. No SVG. No table. No grid. Each fragment is a span element positioned absolutely at viewport bottom.
dataModel: SeepageFragment: {id: string, originalText: string, x: float, y: float, velocityX: float (seeded 0.2-1.4px/frame), capillaryResponse: float (0.3-0.9), state: 'flowing'|'paused'|'crystallized'|'dissolved', crystallizedAt: timestamp|null, viewportZone: string}. Records spawn 3-7 fragments on creation. sessionStorage SeepageArchive persists crystallized states.
interactionModel: pointermove: calculate capillary pressure (gaussian decay, 80px radius) → flowing fragments within radius receive translateY force toward pointer (max -120px), briefly revealing text at opacity 0.4 for 1.2s. dblclick: crystallize all fragments within 60px radius → state=crystallized, velocityX=0, opacity locks at 0.08, remaining flowing fragments lose 15% velocity. 10s stillness: all flowing fragments enter paused state (surface tension). pointerenter/leave on crystallized stains: trigger breathing animation (scale 1.0±0.003, 3s cycle). After 5 crystallizations in same 200px zone: nearby flowing fragments dissolve (scale→0 over 2s, state=dissolved).

approachKey: pure dom+css absolute positioning. no canvas. no svg. no table. no grid. each record is a  | each record: {id:string, text:string, dewpointthreshold:float(0.15-0.85,seeded per record) | pointer warmth field: on pointermove, compute thermal influence at each record's position
renderingMode: Pure DOM+CSS absolute positioning. No canvas. No SVG. No table. No grid. Each record is a div with position:absolute, top/left seeded from noise function, transitions via CSS transition: opacity 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), letter-spacing 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), transform 2.2s ease-out. Background: none. Container: position:relative, overflow:hidden, height:100vh.
dataModel: Each record: {id:string, text:string, dewPointThreshold:float(0.15-0.85,seeded per record), currentPhase:'vapor'|'condensing'|'liquid'|'sublimated', vaporTop:float(%,seeded), vaporLeft:float(%,seeded), stratifiedTop:float(%,computed from dewPoint order), condensationCount:int(default 0), permanentLoss:int(default 0), charactersLost:array<char>}. Phases: vapor(suspended position,opacity 0.03,letter-spacing 42px)→condensing(transitional,opacity 0.4)→liquid(stratified position,opacity 0.88,letter-spacing 0.4px)→sublimated(opacity 0.015,transform scale(0.6)). State stored in sessionStorage CondensationArchive with timestamp.
interactionModel: Pointer warmth field: on pointermove, compute thermal influence at each record's position using gaussian decay(radius 150px, σ=60px). Local temperature = baseTemp(0.3) + warmthInfluence + movementVelocity factor. Records with dewPointThreshold below local temperature evaporate toward vapor. Stillness detection: 6 seconds of no pointermove/pointerdown triggers cooling phase—global temperature decreases 0.05/s for 8 seconds. During cooling, records whose dewPointThreshold exceeds current temp condense downward to stratified layer. Each condensation increments condensationCount and permanently removes 1 random character(replaced with em-dash). After 3 condensations, record enters sublimated(permanent opacity 0.015). DOM updates: record div top/left/opacity/letter-spacing changes via CSS transitions. sessionStorage updates on phase transitions.

approachKey: dom+css | seeded weather-inspired archive entries with barometric state per record. each record trac | pointer proximity within 200px applies local compression—letter-spacing contracts (0 → -4p
dataModel: Seeded weather-inspired archive entries with barometric state per record. Each record tracks: pressureLevel (0-1), compressionRatio, condensedCharCount, breathCyclePhase. Entries generated from loss-themed vocabulary pool.
interactionModel: Pointer proximity within 200px applies local compression—letter-spacing contracts (0 → -4px over 0.8s CSS transition), font-size subtly decreases (1em → 0.92em). Retreating reverses expansion. Sustained proximity (3+ seconds within 80px) triggers irreversible condensation: random characters merge into em-dash. Click on condensed record creates decompression burst—0.6s expansion revealing ghost text of lost characters at opacity 0.04. Horizontal drag applies pressure wave to all records in path, temporarily compressing then releasing them in sequence. State persists in sessionStorage BarometricArchive.
